text.title: project-closure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for project-closure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent marks closure complete based on issue-tracker "Done" state alone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Done status is self-reported by the team. Acceptance requires a signed artefact from the accepting authority — a different party with independent verification.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates lessons learned from ticket history and meeting minutes without human contribution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent-generated lessons are pattern-matched platitudes from training data, not project-specific facts. Require quoted contributions attributed to named participants.

failure-mode.description: Agent sets final cost to zero because no open invoices appear in the system.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Net-60 vendor invoices arrive after project close. Final cost must be flagged as "pending invoices" until the invoice window closes, not auto-zeroed.

failure-mode.description: Agent publishes the closure packet without access control.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Closure packets contain salaries, vendor rates, and customer data. Restrict access before agents publish or distribute.
